body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/receipt-file/upload 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/receipt-file/upload 
 ## 接口描述 
支付回单文件上传，并返回文件唯一编号，可结合绑定回单文件接口使用。
上传附件单个大小不超过10M。
只允许上传文件类型为PNG/JPG/JPEG/OFD/PDF的文件。 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"root","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","required":false},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"FILE","name":"file","required":true,"exampleValue":"","desc":"%20%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E5%A4%A7%E5%B0%8F%E4%B8%8D%E5%BE%97%E8%B6%85%E8%BF%8710M%EF%BC%8C%E5%8F%AA%E5%85%81%E8%AE%B8%E4%B8%8A%E4%BC%A0%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E4%B8%BAPNG%2FJPG%2FJPEG%2FOFD%2FPDF%E7%9A%84%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6","label":"%E5%9B%9E%E5%8D%95%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6"}}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":true,"label":"%E5%9B%9E%E5%8D%95%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E4%B8%8A%E4%BC%A0%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","exampleValue":"true"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"errorMessage","label":"%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%22%E5%8F%AA%E5%85%81%E8%AE%B8%E4%B8%8A%E4%BC%A0%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E4%B8%BAPNG%2FJPG%2FJPEG%2FOFD%2FPDF%E7%9A%84%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%22","required":false}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"fileId","label":"%E5%9B%9E%E5%8D%95%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E4%B8%8A%E4%BC%A0Key","exampleValue":"d05c0eb4-efcd-4616-a4da-718cc2fe9732","required":false,"maxLength":"36"}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 ### 请求报文
{BaseURL}/v1/receipt-file/upload
注意文件上传，参数file
### 响应报文
```json
{
    "success": true,
    "errorMessage": null,
    "fileId": "d05c0eb4-efcd-4616-a4da-718cc2fe9732"
}
```  
## 错误码说明 
| 错误码| 错误信息|解决方案|
  | --- | --- | --- |
  | 400 | 附件大小不可超过10M |  |
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/receipt-file/upload

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/receipt-file/upload

接口描述

支付回单文件上传，并返回文件唯一编号，可结合绑定回单文件接口使用。 上传附件单个大小不超过10M。 只允许上传文件类型为PNG/JPG/JPEG/OFD/PDF的文件。

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[]}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"root","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","required":false},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"FILE","name":"file","required":true,"exampleValue":"","desc":"%20%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E5%A4%A7%E5%B0%8F%E4%B8%8D%E5%BE%97%E8%B6%85%E8%BF%8710M%EF%BC%8C%E5%8F%AA%E5%85%81%E8%AE%B8%E4%B8%8A%E4%BC%A0%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E4%B8%BAPNG%2FJPG%2FJPEG%2FOFD%2FPDF%E7%9A%84%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6","label":"%E5%9B%9E%E5%8D%95%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6"}}]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]}

接口输出参数

{"responseHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}],"responseBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":true,"label":"%E5%9B%9E%E5%8D%95%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E4%B8%8A%E4%BC%A0%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F","exampleValue":"true"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"errorMessage","label":"%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%22%E5%8F%AA%E5%85%81%E8%AE%B8%E4%B8%8A%E4%BC%A0%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E4%B8%BAPNG%2FJPG%2FJPEG%2FOFD%2FPDF%E7%9A%84%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%22","required":false}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"fileId","label":"%E5%9B%9E%E5%8D%95%E6%96%87%E4%BB%B6%E4%B8%8A%E4%BC%A0Key","exampleValue":"d05c0eb4-efcd-4616-a4da-718cc2fe9732","required":false,"maxLength":"36"}}]}]}

接口调用示例

请求报文

{BaseURL}/v1/receipt-file/upload 注意文件上传，参数file

响应报文

{
    "success": true,
    "errorMessage": null,
    "fileId": "d05c0eb4-efcd-4616-a4da-718cc2fe9732"
}

错误码说明

错误码 错误信息 解决方案
400 附件大小不可超过10M
